Description: The antigenic base strain ID of the outbreak infection.
The rate of per-day importation for each node that the intervention is distributed to.
The durations over which to apply import pressure.

The genetic substrain ID of the outbreak infection. Together with **Antigen**, they are a unitary object representing a strain of infection, which allows for differentiation among infections. Values for **Genome** may range from -1 to $2^{Log2\_Number\_of\_Genomes\_per\_Clade-1}$
The age (in days) of infected import cases.
